---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? If this involves a new contract kind or generator, sketch what the YAML would look like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, links, or examples from other tools.
